mnemonics.title: SPI Signal Lines
mnemonics.content: MOST Simple - MOSI, MISO, SCK, SS (the four SPI lines)

mnemonics.title: SPI Modes Order
mnemonics.content: Zero One Two Three - CPOL/CPHA: 0/0, 0/1, 1/0, 1/1 (the four mode numbers in order)

mnemonics.title: Data Sampling Edge
mnemonics.content: CPHA Zero - Sample on First Zero-crossing (CPHA=0 samples on first clock edge)

mnemonics.title: Clock Idle State
mnemonics.content: CPOL Position: 0-Low, 1-High (CPOL=0 means clock idle low, CPOL=1 means clock idle high)
